title: Email & Written Communication - 50 Phrases
definition: 50 phrases for writing clear, professional emails and messages - openings, requests, follow-ups, and closings.

phrases.phrase: I hope this email finds you well
phrases.example: Hi Raj, I hope this email finds you well.

phrases.phrase: I'm writing to follow up on...
phrases.meaning: States the purpose is a follow-up.
phrases.example: I'm writing to follow up on our call last week.

phrases.phrase: I wanted to reach out about...
phrases.meaning: Introduces the topic of the email.
phrases.example: I wanted to reach out about the upcoming deadline.

phrases.phrase: Thanks for your patience
phrases.example: Thanks for your patience while we resolved this.

phrases.phrase: Apologies for the delayed response
phrases.example: Apologies for the delayed response - it's been a busy week.

phrases.phrase: As discussed in our meeting...
phrases.example: As discussed in our meeting, here's the updated proposal.

phrases.phrase: Per our conversation...
phrases.meaning: Refers back to an earlier discussion.
phrases.example: Per our conversation, I've attached the revised contract.

phrases.phrase: Just a quick note to say...
phrases.example: Just a quick note to say the shipment has arrived.

phrases.phrase: I hope you had a great weekend
phrases.example: Hi team, I hope you had a great weekend.

phrases.phrase: Following up on my previous email...
phrases.example: Following up on my previous email regarding the invoice.

phrases.phrase: I'm circling back on this
phrases.meaning: Reintroduces a topic after some time.
phrases.example: I'm circling back on this since I haven't heard back.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for reaching out
phrases.example: Thank you for reaching out - happy to help.

phrases.phrase: It was great connecting with you
phrases.meaning: A warm follow-up after meeting someone.
phrases.example: It was great connecting with you at the conference.

phrases.phrase: I'm reaching out on behalf of...
phrases.example: I'm reaching out on behalf of the product team.

phrases.phrase: Just looping back on this
phrases.meaning: Returns to a previously discussed topic.
phrases.example: Just looping back on this before the deadline.

phrases.phrase: Thanks for the quick turnaround
phrases.example: Thanks for the quick turnaround on the report.

phrases.phrase: Could you please confirm by Friday?
phrases.meaning: Politely requests confirmation with a deadline.
phrases.example: Could you please confirm by Friday so we can proceed?

phrases.phrase: Would you mind sending over the file?
phrases.meaning: A polite request for a document.
phrases.example: Would you mind sending over the file when you get a chance?

phrases.phrase: Please find attached the report
phrases.example: Please find attached the report for your review.

phrases.phrase: Let me know if you have any questions
phrases.example: Let me know if you have any questions about the proposal.

phrases.phrase: Could you loop in the design team?
phrases.meaning: Asks to include others in the conversation.
phrases.example: Could you loop in the design team on this thread?

phrases.phrase: I'd appreciate your feedback on this
phrases.example: I'd appreciate your feedback on this draft.

phrases.phrase: Please let me know your availability
phrases.example: Please let me know your availability next week.

phrases.phrase: Kindly review and revert
phrases.example: Kindly review and revert with your comments.

phrases.phrase: Could you clarify a couple of points?
phrases.example: Could you clarify a couple of points in section two?

phrases.phrase: I'd like to schedule some time to discuss
phrases.example: I'd like to schedule some time to discuss the next steps.

phrases.phrase: Please see my comments below
phrases.meaning: Directs the reader to inline feedback.
phrases.example: Please see my comments below in blue.

phrases.phrase: Can we set up a quick call?
phrases.example: Can we set up a quick call to go over this?

phrases.phrase: I've attached the updated version
phrases.meaning: Notes a revised file is attached.
phrases.example: I've attached the updated version with your changes.

phrases.phrase: Please disregard my previous email
phrases.example: Please disregard my previous email - the issue is resolved.

phrases.phrase: Could you cc me on that thread?
phrases.meaning: Requests to be copied on an email.
phrases.example: Could you cc me on that thread going forward?

phrases.phrase: Happy to jump on a call if easier
phrases.meaning: Offers a call as an alternative to email.
phrases.example: Happy to jump on a call if easier to explain.

phrases.phrase: Let's align on the next steps
phrases.meaning: Suggests agreeing on what happens next.
phrases.example: Let's align on the next steps before Friday.

phrases.phrase: Looking forward to hearing from you
phrases.example: Looking forward to hearing from you soon.

phrases.phrase: Thanks again for your help
phrases.meaning: Expresses gratitude at the end of a message.
phrases.example: Thanks again for your help with this.

phrases.phrase: Please don't hesitate to reach out
phrases.example: Please don't hesitate to reach out if anything's unclear.

phrases.phrase: Best regards
phrases.example: Best regards, Ananya

phrases.phrase: Warm regards
phrases.example: Warm regards, the Support Team

phrases.phrase: Thanks in advance
phrases.meaning: Expresses gratitude before a request is fulfilled.
phrases.example: Thanks in advance for your quick response.

phrases.phrase: I appreciate your understanding
phrases.example: I appreciate your understanding during this transition.

phrases.phrase: Have a great rest of your week
phrases.example: Have a great rest of your week!

phrases.phrase: Let me know if anything changes
phrases.example: Let me know if anything changes on your end.

phrases.phrase: Talk soon
phrases.example: Talk soon, and thanks again.

phrases.phrase: Please keep me posted
phrases.example: Please keep me posted on how the testing goes.

phrases.phrase: I trust this clarifies things
phrases.example: I trust this clarifies things - let me know if not.

phrases.phrase: Excited to move forward on this
phrases.example: Excited to move forward on this together.

phrases.phrase: Sorry for any inconvenience caused
phrases.example: Sorry for any inconvenience caused by the delay.

phrases.phrase: Please treat this as urgent
phrases.example: Please treat this as urgent - the client is waiting.

phrases.phrase: Thank you for your continued support
phrases.example: Thank you for your continued support this quarter.

phrases.phrase: Wishing you a productive week ahead
phrases.example: Wishing you a productive week ahead!

quiz.question: Which phrase politely retracts an earlier email?
options: Looking forward to hearing from you
Could you loop in the design team?
quiz.explanation: This tells the reader to ignore the earlier message.

quiz.question: Which phrase is a standard professional email sign-off?
quiz.explanation: 'Best regards' is a widely used professional closing.

quiz.question: Which phrase requests being copied on an email thread?
options: Could you cc me on that thread?
I'd appreciate your feedback on this
quiz.answer: Could you cc me on that thread?
quiz.explanation: 'CC' means to copy someone on an email.

quiz.question: ___ for the delayed response - it's been a busy week. (apology)
quiz.explanation: 'Apologies' is a polite way to say sorry in professional writing.

quiz.question: Which phrase flags a message as high priority?
options: Have a great rest of your week
quiz.explanation: This clearly signals the message needs immediate attention.
